label: README.md
beginnerDescription: A short README so anyone landing on the repo knows what it is and how to run it.
advancedDescription: Quickstart template extracted from ArchonVII/.github/STARTER.md.

label: LICENSE
beginnerDescription: A license tells other people what they can do with your code.
advancedDescription: Body fetched from api.github.com/licenses/{spdx}; no auth required.

label: .gitignore
beginnerDescription: Tells git which files to never commit (build output, secrets, etc.).
advancedDescription: Body fetched from api.github.com/gitignore/templates/{language}; 'Both' concatenates.

label: AGENTS.md
beginnerDescription: The cross-tool contract for AI agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini) working in this repo.
advancedDescription: Copied from snapshots of ArchonVII/repo-template/AGENTS.md and docs/repo-update-log.md with CHANGELOG-mode placeholder resolved.

label: CLAUDE.md
beginnerDescription: A short file that tells Claude to read AGENTS.md first.
advancedDescription: 5-line stub. Claude-specific addenda land below the pointer.

label: GEMINI.md
beginnerDescription: Same as CLAUDE.md but for Gemini.
advancedDescription: 5-line stub pointing at AGENTS.md.

label: .agent/coordination/ contract
beginnerDescription: A short contract telling agents this repo coordinates only itself — no shared boards, no assumptions about other repos.
advancedDescription: Copied from snapshots of ArchonVII/repo-template/.agent/coordination/README.md. Locked neutral contract; the active board (.agent/coordination/board.md) is the separate opt-in coordination-board feature. Ordered before git-init so the contract lands in the initial commit.

label: .githooks/
beginnerDescription: Installs the standard local git hooks for commit-message and protected-branch guardrails.
advancedDescription: Copied from repo-template snapshots with repo-template-internal references scrubbed. core.hooksPath is activated by git-init when safe.

label: .gitattributes
beginnerDescription: Keeps shell hooks and scripts on LF endings.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline.

label: CHANGELOG.md + fragments
beginnerDescription: Adds a Keep a Changelog file and unreleased-fragment folder.
advancedDescription: Mode 2 changelog-fragment baseline copied from repo-template snapshots.

label: actionlint workflow
beginnerDescription: Adds workflow syntax checking for any repo that has GitHub Actions files.
advancedDescription: Thin caller to ArchonVII/github-workflows/.github/workflows/actionlint.yml@v1. No language or stack assumption.

label: CODEOWNERS
beginnerDescription: Adds a top-level CODEOWNERS file when the GitHub owner is known.
advancedDescription: Writes '* @<owner>'. If no owner is known, records an intentional skip instead of writing junk ownership.

label: Dependabot
beginnerDescription: Adds weekly GitHub Actions dependency updates.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline. Inert until the repo is pushed.

label: Pull request template
beginnerDescription: Adds the standard ArchonVII PR body structure and verification checklist.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline.

label: git init + initial commit on main
beginnerDescription: Sets up version control and saves the first snapshot of the repo.
advancedDescription: `git init -b main`, stages tracked files only, single initial commit.

label: Create GitHub repo
beginnerDescription: Creates the repo on github.com and pushes your initial commit.
advancedDescription: Uses `gh repo create OWNER/REPO --source=. --remote=origin --push`.

label: Apply standard labels
beginnerDescription: Adds ~30 standard labels (type / severity / priority / effort / status / workflow).
advancedDescription: Invokes ArchonVII/github-workflows/scripts/setup-repo.mjs --solo for label application.

label: Apply baseline branch protection
beginnerDescription: Protects main: require PRs, no force-push, conversations must resolve. Named required checks come later.
advancedDescription: Baseline only. Named required status checks are deferred (GitHub requires a check to have run within 7 days before it can be required). A postCheck is recorded in the manifest.

label: .agent/check-map.yml
beginnerDescription: Records which local paths require which checks so agents and the required gate share one policy map.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline. The single required gate remains the branch-protection contract; this file documents and customizes the path-to-check matrix.

label: Coordination board (active)
beginnerDescription: Adds an active multi-agent coordination board for repos where several agents or people work concurrently. Skip it if you don't need active coordination.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline at .agent/coordination/board.md. Opt-in companion to the locked foundation.coordination contract. Names no other repo or machine path; the repo decides whether live board state is tracked.

label: Anomaly triage
beginnerDescription: While an agent is writing code, it can flag side bugs it notices into a per-PR file. This workflow turns them into PR comments or new issues automatically.
advancedDescription: Caller to ArchonVII/github-workflows/anomaly-triage.yml@v1. Pairs with the AGENTS.md contract section documenting `.archon/anomalies-thispr.md` (shipped by repo-template). Idempotent across PR re-syncs via fingerprint markers.

label: pr-policy.yml
beginnerDescription: Blocks a PR until its body has a `## Verification` section, at least one checked checkbox, and links an issue.
advancedDescription: Caller to github-workflows/.github/workflows/pr-policy.yml@v1.

label: semantic-pr-title.yml
beginnerDescription: Blocks PRs whose titles don't follow the `type(scope): description` convention.
advancedDescription: Caller wraps amannn/action-semantic-pull-request@v5 via the @v1 reusable workflow.

label: pr-body-autoinject.yml
beginnerDescription: If a bot (like Copilot) opens a PR with an empty body, this injects the verification template.
advancedDescription: Runs on `opened` only. Idempotent — won't overwrite an existing stub.

label: branch-naming.yml
beginnerDescription: Blocks branch names that don't match the agreed convention (e.g. `agent/claude/12-foo`).
advancedDescription: Default regex covers the conventions documented in repo-template/AGENTS.md.

label: Repo Required Gate
beginnerDescription: Installs one always-reporting required branch-protection gate. Configure branch protection to require `repo-required-gate / decision`.
advancedDescription: Caller to github-workflows/.github/workflows/repo-required-gate.yml@v1. It detects changed paths, runs only relevant checks, and exposes a stable decision job for branch protection.

label: Node CI (ci.yml)
beginnerDescription: Runs lint, typecheck, and tests on every PR. Pick this if your repo has a package.json.
advancedDescription: Caller to github-workflows/.github/workflows/node-ci.yml@v1. Detects npm/pnpm/yarn from the lockfile. Job is named `ci-success` so branch protection can require a single check across all `workflow.*-ci` choices.

label: Python CI (ci.yml)
beginnerDescription: Runs ruff lint, ruff format-check, pyright, and pytest on every PR. Pick this if your repo has a pyproject.toml or requirements.txt.
advancedDescription: Caller to github-workflows/.github/workflows/python-ci.yml@v1. Uses uv when pyproject.toml is present; falls back to pip. Job is named `ci-success` so branch protection can require a single check across all `workflow.*-ci` choices.

label: Minimal CI (no build/test)
beginnerDescription: A no-op check that always passes. Pick this for docs-only or snapshot repos that have no build or test.
advancedDescription: Installs a `ci-success` no-op job so branch protection has a stable required check name regardless of repo type. Pairs with `actionlint.yml` (issue #16 / F3) for workflow-syntax coverage even when there is no language CI.
